title: ContractsNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-contract-service-rs (Solana contract validation, simulation, settlement, and dispute resolution).

$dd:nats.summary: Solana contract validation, settlement, and resolution subjects.

subjects.name: ContractsSolanaValidate
subjects.description: Validation requests for solana.contract.v1 instruction envelopes. Default for CONTRACT_VALIDATE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.contracts.solana.validate

subjects.name: ContractsSolanaResults
subjects.description: Published validation/simulation results. Default for CONTRACT_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.contracts.solana.results

subjects.name: ContractsSolanaSettle
subjects.description: Settlement requests for solana.settlement.v1 envelopes (fund/release/refund/partial-release/split-release/dispute-award/expire/cancel). Default for CONTRACT_SETTLE_SUBJECT. NATS-initiated broadcast is off unless CONTRACT_NATS_SETTLEMENT_ENABLED=true; otherwise the service only validates, simulates, and confirms.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.contracts.solana.settle

subjects.name: ContractsSolanaResolve
subjects.description: Dispute resolution requests for solana.resolution.v1 envelopes (release-to-payee/refund-to-payer/split/award-to-claimant/uphold/overturn). Default for CONTRACT_RESOLVE_SUBJECT. Same NATS broadcast gating as ContractsSolanaSettle.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.contracts.solana.resolve

subjects.name: ContractsSolanaSettlementResults
subjects.description: Published settlement and dispute-resolution outcomes, including on-chain confirmation status. Default for CONTRACT_SETTLEMENT_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.contracts.solana.settlement.results
